meaning: n.<美>(棒球本垒后的)挡网,捕手,支持物,支撑物
examples: That provides a backstop against cancer.
My first kiss was behind the backstop of a baseball field.
Lehman might not be able to, despite the financial backstop from the Federal Reserve that continues until mid-January.
The Treasury is considering a "backstop" program, but he was vague about what that would be.
